results.rendered_html: ānukūlya (von anukūla) n. Gemässheit, Uebereinstimmung, Geneigtheit, Zuneigung  AK. 3,5,4 .  P. 1,4,78 , Sch. 8,1,33 , Sch.  VOP. 7,91 . yatrānukūlyaṃ [Page1-0645] daṃpatyoḥ  YĀJÑ. 1,74 .
